evidence: architect BLOCK: visual-lane error masking + Node engines mismatch (>=18 vs puppeteer 25 needs >=22.12). red-team blocker: audit --visual missing file exposes node:internal stack trace (cli.js:28). full matrix otherwise pass (16 cases).

goal.objective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

evidence: architect BLOCK: fetchSource re-resolves DNS at fetch time (rebinding bypass, intake.js:163), ::ffff:172.16/12 mapped range unblocked (intake.js:108). red-team B1: ftp:///file:// routed to fs read exit 2 instead of guard exit 1. B2: 1MB digit line hangs extraction >30s SIGKILL.

goal.objective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

executorQa.evidence: Two executor red-team lanes over real CLI surface. Lane 1 (visual): 16-case matrix incl. L1/S3 threshold boundaries (2-card, 5px delta, 3-text, 79% center all correctly NOT flagged), display:none and inherited-center bypass attempts caught, no-puppeteer fallback verified from /tmp copy; 1 blocker (stack trace on missing file) fixed + regression tests. Lane 2 (intake): 10-case SSRF matrix (0.0.0.0, [::1], localhost:8080, 127.1, octal 0177.0.0.1, metadata IP, userinfo trick, case-insensitive) all blocked stackless; 2 blockers (ftp/file routing, 1MB number bomb hang) fixed + regression tests. Final rerun: npm test 44 tests 42 pass 2 skip 0 fail; npm run benchmark 4/4.
